benefits.description: No dramatic skin changes noticed; possibly limited results

side_effects.description: Surprisingly minimal injection site irritation despite high dose

protocol_notes: OP accidentally used a 100mg vial believing it was 10mg, resulting in 2.5mg injections 3x/week (7.5mg/week intended dose misread as 75mg/week). Used for approximately 2 months. Realized the error 1 month prior to posting. Expressed concern about copper toxicity. Reported minimal noticeable results and questioned supplier quality.
